request.networkUnavailable: The request is unavailable. Please try again or check your network.

http.200: The server successfully returned the requested data.
http.202: A request has entered the background queue (asynchronous task).
http.400: Bad error request, and the server did not create or modify the data.
http.401: User does not have permission (invalid username, password, security token).
http.403: User is authorized, but access is forbidden.
http.404: The requested record does not exist, and the server did not process it.
http.410: The requested resource is permanently deleted and will no longer be available.
http.422: A validation error occurred while creating the object.
http.500: An error occurred on the server. Please check the server.
http.503: The server is temporarily unable to service your request due to maintenance or capacity issues.

detail.title: Detail panel
detail.sidePlaceholder: Replace this side panel with module-specific navigation, filters, or auxiliary content.
detail.panelSummary: This detail page is ready for resource {resourceId}. Replace the summary, sections, and widgets with your own domain content.
detail.sectionOverviewDescription: A concise snapshot section for key information.
detail.sectionTimelineDescription: A flexible slot for events, audit history, or progress.
detail.sectionNotesDescription: A placeholder for annotations, remarks, or next actions.
